body: Has anyone used cargo-flamegraph for profiling Rust code? Trying to find a performance bottleneck.
Yes! It's great. Make sure you compile with debug symbols: cargo flamegraph --release with debug=true in profile.
Found it — the bottleneck was in a hot loop doing unnecessary allocations. Switching to a pre-allocated buffer fixed it.
Classic Rust optimization. Also check if you can use iterators instead of collecting into vecs in intermediate steps.
Good call, I found two more places where I was collecting unnecessarily. Total speedup was about 3x.
